```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_provision.md generates PROVISIONED_USER containing temp_password and stores it in shared context; skill_notify.md receives PROVISIONED_USER and includes the temp_password value directly in an email sent via SMTP to the employee's external email address without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates a temporary password via openssl and embeds it in PROVISIONED_USER dictionary (including temp_password field) which is stored in shared agent context. skill_notify.md retrieves PROVISIONED_USER from context and uses the temp_password value directly in the welcome email body as '$TEMP_PASSWORD'. The email containing this credential is sent via SMTP (server.send_message) to the employee's email address, which exits the internal trust boundary to reach the employee's mailbox."
}
```
